name: Bank of America ATM
description_short: Bank of America Walk-Up ATM located at 130 Fulton Street in New York, NY. Offers 24-hour cardless ATM access with multilingual support and deposit capabilities.
description_long:
Bank of America is one of the largest banking institutions in the United States, operating an extensive network of ATMs nationwide. This specific location is a Walk-Up ATM situated at 130 Fulton Street in New York's Financial District, providing round-the-clock access to cash and banking services. The ATM operates 24 hours daily and is positioned inside a building for customer convenience.

This ATM location offers standard cash withdrawal services along with several modern banking conveniences. Customers can deposit funds and make credit card payments at this machine. The ATM supports cardless transactions through tap-to-pay cards and smartphone digital wallets, allowing customers to access funds without a physical debit card. The machine provides multilingual instructions in English, Spanish, Chinese, Korean, French, Russian, and Portuguese to accommodate New York's diverse population.

What distinguishes this Bank of America ATM is its integration with the bank's broader mobile and digital banking ecosystem. Users can access additional services through the Bank of America mobile banking app, including mobile check deposit with instant confirmation, customizable financial alerts, and biometric security features like fingerprint or Face ID authentication. The location is part of Bank of America's commitment to accessible banking with specialized support available through local branches and financial specialists.

For consumers, this ATM serves as a basic cash access point with added conveniences like cardless transactions and multilingual support. However, this is an ATM-only location with no in-person banking services, loan applications, or account opening capabilities. Users seeking comprehensive banking services, financial advice, or account management would need to visit a full-service Bank of America branch. The ATM's primary value is convenience for existing Bank of America customers or those seeking quick cash access in lower Manhattan.
pros: 24-hour operation provides round-the-clock ATM access in Financial District location
Cardless ATM functionality supports tap-to-pay cards and smartphone digital wallet transactions
Accepts deposits and credit card payments in addition to standard cash withdrawals
Multilingual interface in 7 languages (English, Spanish, Chinese, Korean, French, Russian, Portuguese)
Located inside a building for weather protection and security
Integration with Bank of America mobile app for mobile check deposit and account alerts
Biometric security options (fingerprint/Face ID) available through mobile banking
cons: ATM-only location with no access to financial advisors, loan officers, or account services
No information about fees for non-Bank of America customers or out-of-network usage charges
Limited to basic ATM transactions; cannot assist with complex banking needs or account issues
best_for: Bank of America customers needing 24-hour cash access in Lower Manhattan
Business professionals working in the Financial District seeking convenient ATM services
Multilingual users who benefit from ATM instructions in seven languages
diagnosis: This location is best for existing Bank of America customers or visitors to the Financial District who need convenient 24-hour cash access with modern digital banking features. The key caveat is that this is an ATM-only location; customers requiring financial advice, loan products, account troubleshooting, or in-person banking services must visit a full-service Bank of America branch.
services: Cardless ATM transactions using tap-to-pay cards
Mobile check deposit with instant confirmation
Customizable financial alerts through mobile app
Account access 24/7 via mobile and online banking
